message:
feat(wasm): add FrankenDb import/export for database serialization

New FrankenDb::import(Uint8Array) creates in-memory DB from byte array.
New FrankenDb::export() serializes DB to Uint8Array via pager-level
export_database_bytes(). Tests cover roundtrip (including BLOB fidelity)
and empty-image rejection.

Enables WASM users to serialize/deserialize databases for IndexedDB
storage, download, and upload use cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
